content: Update MOD-001 AddPantryItemModal: 'Crear ingrediente nuevo' continues to pantry form (not auto-close); save with user_ingredient_id; simplified unit selector (base only) + helper text
Update MOD-001 search: also query user_ingredients (status=pending, current user); display 'Pendiente' pill on quarantine results
Update PantryScreen fetch: include user_ingredient_id + join user_ingredients; show 'Pendiente' pill on quarantine rows
Update MOD-002 EditPantryItemModal: handle quarantine items (base-unit-only selector + helper text + correct name source)
Update PantryItemRow: render 'Pendiente' pill when item has user_ingredient_id
Add recipe title duplicate check on Step 1 and Step 5 of wizard (case- and trim-insensitive, accent-sensitive, exclude drafts and self)
